prompt: Create a hyper-detailed Japanese weekly shonen manga magazine cover, full-bleed, explosive and crowded, with no empty space. The format is a single vertically oriented magazine cover illustration packed with layered typography, character art, motion effects, and urban sci-fi chaos. At the top, a gigantic stylized Japanese masthead in fiery orange-red with heavy black outline and gold edging dominates the width of the page, reading 週刊少年ブレイズ, with a small celebratory badge integrated into the title showing 40年. Add a small slogan line across the very top edge in Japanese. In the top right corner, place a black issue-information box with bright yellow and white text showing the date 2026年4月22日号 and the price 特別価格 380円. The main image features exactly 3 anime characters in a dynamic triangular composition. In the center foreground, the star heroine lunges toward the viewer with strong foreshortening, one hand thrust out almost touching the camera. She is a teenage gyaru-style action heroine with light brown with pink streaks long wavy hair flying wildly, sharp golden-brown eyes, a confident mischievous grin, sun-kissed skin, multiple ear piercings, and a flashy rebellious street-fighter vibe. Her outfit is black and gold with exactly 6 key visible pieces: a cropped top, a short jacket with metallic trim, short shorts, a belt with dangling chains, a thigh strap on one leg, and fingerless gloves. Add gold lightning motifs and glossy highlights across her clothing. Around her hand and body, draw arcs of yellow energy and speed streaks to emphasize impact. Behind her on the left midground, place a white-haired teenage boy in a black-and-white futuristic combat outfit, crouched aggressively and aiming a large mechanical gauntlet or weapon toward the viewer, surrounded by icy blue shards and angular motion lines. Behind her on the right midground, place a pink-haired teenage girl with twin tails or tied-up hair, wielding a circular bladed ring weapon, posed in motion with vivid magenta energy trails. In the upper right background, add a fourth visual focal area but not a separate main character count: a dark-haired teenage boy in a green-black combat suit aiming a glowing sci-fi rifle diagonally across the page, partially obscured by text and effects, embedded into the background action. The background is a dense neon-lit futuristic Japanese city street at night with tilted perspective, towering signs, debris, sparks, shattered fragments, electric streaks, and saturated blues, purples, pinks, and oranges. Use extreme contrast, glossy print texture, ink splatter accents, halftone-like manga magazine energy, and premium anime key visual rendering. Add large dramatic Japanese cover copy on the left in stacked blocks with thick white, yellow, red, and black lettering, including the prominent headline 新時代をブチ抜く 超熱量ヒロイン ここに爆誕!!. Add exactly 5 left-side feature callouts in colored rectangular boxes with bold names and smaller subtitle lines beneath: 雷閃ブレイカー / 天城ノア, 空駆けエンジン / 南雲ハヤト, 魔境デリバリー / 倉科ミツル, 白狼ストライカー / 久世リョウ, 超深海クラッシュ / 早瀬シン. Add exactly 5 right-side feature callouts in matching bold boxes: 極光パレット / 鳴海ユウト, 機巧グラフィティ / 胡野レイ, 龍骨ランナー / 火野アツシ, 王冠のラグナ / 深町カイ, 風神リベリオン / 東雲ガク. Also add exactly 3 promotional bursts on the right side in starburst or explosive label shapes with large yellow and white lettering: 巻頭カラー, 特大ポスター付き, 新連載スタート. Make the entire cover feel like a blockbuster debut issue for a hot new battle manga era, energetic, rebellious, flashy, polished, and unmistakably like a high-impact Japanese manga magazine cover illustration.
